commit.message:
Auto-link ticket IDs from git commit messages to reference nodes

Parse commit messages for ticket patterns (PROJ-123) during git enrichment,
create reference nodes, and link them to changed files. Adds integration
tests for ticket auto-linking and reference node discovery via assembly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: バグ修正まとめ（ランダム配置・出欠マトリクス・ファイル添付） (#59)

* feat: サマリー余白・ファイル添付・メンバー外乗員・出欠同期改善

- サマリー下余白を140pxに増加して見切れを解消
- 出欠マトリクスからのイベントタップ：ファイル添付セクションを非表示
  （イベントモーダルをマスターとして同期、出欠マトリクスでは非表示）
- carpool概要タブのoverview.jsバージョン更新（キャッシュ問題修正）
- 車提供フォームにメンバー外乗員入力欄を追加
  ・備考の上に入力欄を表示（決定で確定、一人確定ごとに次の欄が出現）
  ・最大登録数 = 座席数
  ・車両カードにメンバー外乗員を表示
- 割り当て画面でメンバー外乗員を自動配置（後列→中列→助手席の順）
  ・グレー背景でメンバーと区別
  ・タップで名前修正/削除モーダルを表示

https://claude.ai/code/session_011qpggXDFWerpGztjX6Qr3V

* 運転手アイコンをメンバー座席と同じデザインに変更

- createDriverSeat: 2文字イニシャル丸アイコンを廃止し、seat-name-tagでabbr/フル名を表示
- 学年色の背景tintとテキスト色をメンバー座席と同じロジックで適用
- _applyDriverChange: アイコンのtextContentではなくseat-name-tagを更新するよう修正

https://claude.ai/code/session_011qpggXDFWerpGztjX6Qr3V

* assignment.js キャッシュバスト: バージョンを20260307に更新

https://claude.ai/code/session_011qpggXDFWerpGztjX6Qr3V

* fix: ランダム配置で全メンバーが配置されないバグを修正

- generateRandomAssignments が「参加」マークのある選手だけを対象にしていたため、
  出欠未入力のメンバーが「配置待ち」に残ってしまう問題を修正
- 「欠席」確定のメンバーのみ除外し、未入力・参加確定は全員配置対象にするよう変更
- updateMembersList も同じ基準（欠席者を除外）で配置待ちリストを表示するよう修正

https://claude.ai/code/session_011qpggXDFWerpGztjX6Qr3V

* feat: 出欠マトリクスで対象外メンバーに「－」を表示

- イベントの対象学年に含まれないメンバーのセルは「－」（グレー）を表示
- 対象学年内だが未回答は「未」、参加は「◯」、欠席は「✖」はそのまま
- extraPlayers（学年外追加選手）は対象として扱う
- mx-na CSSクラスを追加

https://claude.ai/code/session_011qpggXDFWerpGztjX6Qr3V

* fix: 概要タブのファイル添付が動かない問題を修正

Firebase Storage SDKがoverview.htmlに読み込まれていなかったため
firebase.storage()が使えずファイル読み込みが止まっていた

https://claude.ai/code/session_011qpggXDFWerpGztjX6Qr3V

---------

commit.message:
fix: center tagline text on all screen sizes

Add text-align: center and width: 100% to .header .tagline
to ensure consistent centering on mobile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Solutions full-width panels + scroll bg transitions + text updates

Solutions section:
- Rebuilt as 5 full-width stacked panels (replacing horizontal scroll)
- Each panel min-height 70vh with --panel-img CSS var slot for images
- Alternating left/right content, amber accent line, huge display titles
- Dark gradient overlay for readability over any background image

Background color transitions:
- Fixed #page-bg div: dark→amber→grey cycling per section (0.9s ease)
- Hero/About: #000, Sectors/Partners: #1a0e00, Solutions/Contact: #131313
- All section backgrounds removed so page-bg shows through

Content updates:
- Hero sub: added 'cybersecurity' to the description
- Remove 'Sectors'/'Solutions' labels above section headings
- Remove 'Our Purpose/Where We're Going/What Drives Us' + 01/02/03 numbers from About
- Mission→Our Mission, Vision→Our Vision
- Contact label: 'Leave Us a Message'
- Footer logo: 36px→140px
- About layout: removed number column, simplified to single column

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix QBX compatibility — GetCoreObject doesn't exist in qbx_core

QBX dropped the monolithic GetCoreObject export. Build a shim that
wraps qbx_core's per-function exports (GetPlayer, GetPlayers) so the
rest of the bridge can keep using QBCore.Functions.* uniformly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: clean up stale triage session when navigating back to task (#76)

When triage finishes while the user is viewing another task, the
TaskWorkspace cleanup effect never fires (component is unmounted).
This leaves a stale session in the store with a sessionId, which
prevents the Start button from appearing on return. Add a mount-time
effect to detect and remove leftover triage sessions.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
perf: exclude dev tools from production bundle, lazy-load images

- Move TanStack devtools into DevToolsPanel component lazy-loaded only
  when import.meta.env.DEV — removes @tanstack/react-devtools,
  @tanstack/react-router-devtools, @tanstack/react-query-devtools from
  the production JS bundle entirely
- Add loading="lazy" to ToolCard logo and screenshot images — defers
  off-screen image fetches on list pages with 12–16 cards, improving LCP
- Hoist Intl.NumberFormat instance to module level in SaveToolButton to
  avoid re-constructing it on every render

Fix NameError in CSV import when first_name is provided directly

The 'name' variable was only set inside the fallback branch, causing
a NameError when first_name/last_name columns were present (as in
TM4 exports). Now 'name' is always read from the input and built
from first_name + last_name if not provided.

Com 805 rows em 6 layers ordenadas por point_count DESC,
limit=500 cortava regulation (6 rows, count baixo) e parte de papers.
2000 garante que todos os layers chegam ao frontend.

- Increase schedules endpoint timeout to 30s (heavy for 1,093 HK schedules)

commit.message:
Fix: prevent 419 when using admin + cabinet simultaneously

- Cabinet logout: replace session()->invalidate() with regenerateToken()
  to avoid wiping admin/manager guard sessions
- Cabinet login: replace session()->regenerate() with regenerateToken()
  to avoid changing session ID and breaking other open forms
- Manager login: same fix (regenerateToken instead of regenerate)
- Filament admin login: override with custom AdminLogin page that uses
  regenerateToken() instead of regenerate() for the same reason

commit.message:
Fix DUI leak on resource restart

DestroyDui was never called when the resource stopped, leaving
orphaned DUI objects in memory across restarts. Added an
onResourceStop handler to clean it up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add auto-scroll to bottom for session messages

Automatically scrolls to keep up with new content when the user is
near the bottom of the scroll view. On submit, always scrolls to
bottom. If the user scrolls up to read history, auto-scroll pauses
until they return near the bottom.

fix: move sorted() inside try/except in rerank for non-scalar scores

If a non-standard cross-encoder model returns array logits instead of
scalars, the sorted() call would raise outside the try/except, crashing
instead of falling back. Now the entire predict+sort is guarded, and
float(x[0]) coerces array-like scores to scalar.

commit.message:
fix: replace remote image URLs in task markdown with local attachments (#74)

* fix: replace remote image URLs in task markdown with local attachments

Remote image links from Linear, Notion, and HubSpot expire over time,
causing images to stop rendering in task descriptions. After downloading
attachments locally, we now rewrite those URLs to use a custom
app-attachment:// protocol that serves files from the local disk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve typecheck errors and deduplicate URL replacement logic

- Remove unused readFileSync import from index.ts
- Remove TOCTOU existsSync check in protocol handler (let readdirSync throw)
- Extract replaceRemoteImageUrlsInTask() helper to eliminate copy-paste across 3 plugins
- Fix TS2352 cast error by using Record<string, unknown> with unknown intermediate cast
- Change replaceRemoteImageUrls param type to Record<string, unknown>[] for flexibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use pathToFileURL to properly encode spaces in attachment file paths

The userData path on macOS contains "Application Support" (with a space),
and filenames can also have spaces/parens. Using template string file://
URLs left these unencoded, causing net.fetch to fail with broken images.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: allow app-attachment:// URLs in Markdown renderer

ReactMarkdown's defaultUrlTransform only allows http, https, mailto,
and xmpp protocols. Our custom app-attachment:// URLs were being
stripped to empty strings, causing broken images. Add a custom
urlTransform that passes through app-attachment:// URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

GH-876: fix gitignore blocking cmd/sdd-hello-world/ source directory

sdd-hello-world's .gitignore has a bare "sdd-hello-world" entry intended
to ignore the compiled binary at the repo root. This pattern matches at
any directory level, including cmd/sdd-hello-world/ (the source directory),
preventing git add -A from staging generated Go source files.

Add fixSnapshotGitignore to PrepareSnapshot that prefixes bare binary-name
entries with "/" so they only match at the repo root. This fixes UC004's
SecondMeasureProducesNoNewTasks where stitch wrote code but git committed
zero changes.

Filed petar-djukic/sdd-hello-world#31 for the upstream fix.

commit.message:
Day 4 post-audit fixes: false chapter advance guard, re-split after column merge, V4 gap detection

Bug 1 — False chapter advance (root cause of 49 duplicates):
Replace bare `chapter_num == current_chapter + 1` with an 80% verse-count
guard (`current_verse >= max_v * 4 // 5`). Added `chapter_verse_counts`
field to GEN entry in anchor_registry.json and wired it through
ExtractionState. Eliminates false advances at GEN.11:12, 13:14, 21:22,
24:25, 27:28, 30:31.

Bug 2 — Column-split merge loses subsequent verse splits:
After merging a continuation fragment, re-run RE_VERSE_SPLIT on the merged
text. If additional boundaries are found, pop the last verse + its footnote
markers, then re-split and re-emit. Recovers GEN.3:9-15 and similar
collapses.

Fix 3 — anchor_registry.json GEN entry:
Add `chapters: 50` and `chapter_verse_counts` (LXX 50-element list) to
enable V2 chapter-count check and Bug 1 guard.

Fix 4 — validate_canon.py V4 gap detection + exit-code bug:
V4 now also warns on gaps (missing verses), not just backward movement.
`validate_file` returns `(errors, warnings)` tuple so V2/V4 warnings in
non-strict mode no longer trigger sys.exit(1).

Additional fix — consecutive same-anchor deduplication in _emit_parts:
PDF column-split fragments sometimes restate the verse number at the start
of the second column (e.g. "28 Therefore..." after GEN.27:28 was already
emitted). Merging consecutive same-anchor entries eliminates these
structural duplicates without masking genuine errors.

Results (GEN): V1 PASS (0 dups, 1448 unique), V2 PASS (50 chapters),
V3 PASS (sequential), V4 67 warnings (all expected lowercase-split gaps,
deferred Phase 2). Verse count: 1448 (up from 1404 pre-fix).

commit.message:
feat: add 24h countdown timer to next allowed peace action

After clicking the peace button, show a live HH:MM:SS countdown
to midnight (when the next action is unlocked). Timer starts
immediately on setDone() and ticks every second.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: FEAT-007 recent files + FEAT-009 auto-save + Tools menu with Preferences

FEAT-007 (REQ-027):
- File > Recent Files submenu tracking last 5 saved/opened annotation files
- QSettings-based persistence across restarts; deduplication; Clear action
- Silent removal of non-existent files with status bar notification
- Hooked into _do_save() and _detect_annotations_for_3d_file()
- Fix: _load_project_file() now calls _restore_data_source() so 3D projection
  is restored when opening via Recent Files

FEAT-009 (REQ-029, auto-save only):
- 5-minute QTimer writes .<name>.autosave.json alongside project file when dirty
- Autosave skipped when no project path set or project is clean
- Autosave file deleted on successful manual save
- Crash recovery excluded (REQ-029 marked Partial)

Tools menu / Preferences:
- Edit menu renamed to Tools
- Tools > Preferences... dialog: auto-save enable/disable + interval (1–60 min)
- Settings persisted via QSettings; timer updated immediately on dialog accept

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove invalidate_superseded_synthetics function and main() wiring (#1219)

The squash merge of #1218 added the new dedup logic in
get_local_active_positions() but didn't remove the old
invalidate_superseded_synthetics() function and its call in main().
This commit completes the cleanup.

Co-authored-by: Claude Code Bot <claude-code@coffee-bot.dev>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(cli): add `vertz start` production server command [#941] (#944)

Add a new `vertz start` command that serves production builds with three
modes: API-only, UI-only, and full-stack. Reuses detectAppType() for mode
detection and createSSRHandler() from @vertz/ui-server for SSR rendering.

Features:
- Validates build outputs before starting (clear error messages)
- SSR + static file serving with proper cache headers
- CSS inlining to prevent FOUC
- Path traversal guard for static files
- Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP
- Port config via --port flag, PORT env, or default 3000
- Scaffold template now includes "start": "vertz start"

Closes #941

Co-authored-by: vertz-dev-front[bot] <2828126+vertz-dev-front[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
